violations.text: A spray bottle of floor cleaner was stored with food. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC relocated bottle. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
2 door refrigerator was not in good repair. Equipment was out of service prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The floors (in the back storage room under equipment and under dumpsink) and walls (in back storage room) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
